subject: feat(style): add per-cell background color override
body:
Cells can now override the theme primary background with any theme
color (primary/secondary/accent) or neutral color. Accessible via
Style > Spacing > Cell N > Custom background checkbox.

State stored in layout.cellBackgrounds (object keyed by cell index),
following the same shift/swap/cleanup pattern as cellOverlays.

Also includes PDF improvements from earlier commits:
- document.fonts.ready wait before capture
- PDF title/creator metadata
- Reverted pxToPt=0.5 (preserved full resolution for sharing)

Tags: style, background, per-cell, ui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: cell-customization
Semver: minor
